name: Ancient Apparition
description: One day, ice will cover these lands, and it will be as if this war never happened.

abilities.name: Bone Chill
abilities.description: Applies a movement speed slow debuff to all enemy units affected by Kaldr's abilities. Additionally reduces the debuff-affected enemy hero's Strength per Stack: 2%. Duration: 4.

abilities.name: Cold Feet
abilities.description: Cold Feet is now an area-targeted ability and applies the debuff to all enemy units within the radius upon cast. Cast Range: 700/800/900/1000. Break Radius: 725/750/775/800 (975/1000/1025/1050). Damage per Second: 20/40/60/80 (50/70/90/110). Damage Duration: 4. Stun Duration: 1.8/2.2/2.6/3. Effect Radius: 450. Cooldown: 15/13/11/9. Mana Cost: 125.

abilities.name: Ice Vortex
abilities.description: Applies a movement speed slow and magic resistance reduction to enemy units within its radius. Grants flying vision centered around the effect radius. Cast Range: 1200. Effect Radius: 275. Move Speed Slow: 8%. Damage per Second: 10/20/30/40. Magic Resist Reduction: 16%/19%/22%/25%. Duration: 6/8/10/12. Cooldown: 10/8/6/4 (8/6/4/2). Mana Cost: 40/55/70/85.

abilities.name: Chilling Touch
abilities.description: Enhances Kaldr's attack with increased attack range, heavy magic damage, and movement speed slow. Cast Range: 735/765/795/825 (1035/1065/1095/1125). Damage: 30/60/90/120 (110/140/170/200). Move Speed Slow: 100%. Slow Duration: 0.7/0.8/0.9/1. Cooldown: 12/9/6/3 (0). Mana Cost: 35.

abilities.name: Ice Blast
abilities.description: Enemy units caught in the explosion, or came in contact of the ice projectile as it travels, take damage over time with heal and health regeneration sources no longer working for them. If an enemy hero's current health drops below a certain threshold, they instantly shatter. Min Impact Radius: 275. Max Impact Radius: 1000. Radius Increment per Second: 50. First Damage: 250/325/400. Cooldown: 60/50/40. Mana Cost: 175.
